questions.question: There are five _____ in the zoo. They are from Europe.
questions.explanation: wolves是wolf的复数形式。fox的复数是foxes，lion和tiger的复数直接加s。

questions.question: I don't like these snakes at all. I think they are too ______.
questions.explanation: 根据前句'不喜欢蛇'可知，认为它们太'可怕'。

questions.question:
—Excuse me. ______ is the post office?
—It's opposite the bank, just over there.
questions.explanation: 根据回答'在银行对面'可知问的是地点，用Where。

questions.question: The box is too heavy, so the little boy can't ______ it.
questions.explanation: 箱子太重，小男孩搬不动。carry表示'搬运'。

questions.question: There are ______ cars and buses in the street at this time of day.
questions.explanation: cars和buses是可数名词复数，用too many。too much修饰不可数名词，much too修饰形容词。

questions.question:
—Don't read in bed, Sam. It's not ______ your eyes.
—OK. I won't do it again.
questions.explanation: be good for表示'对...有益'。这里说对眼睛不好。

questions.question: Xiaogang helps to ______ his younger sister when his parents are busy.
questions.explanation: look after表示'照顾'。父母忙的时候照顾妹妹。

questions.question:
—Could you help me ______ the eraser on the floor?
—Sure, here you are.
questions.explanation: pick up表示'捡起'。橡皮掉地上需要捡起来。

questions.question: You can't ______ these trees if you don't have a felling license.
questions.explanation: cut down表示'砍倒'。没有采伐许可证不能砍树。

questions.question:
—Can you tell me ______?
—Sure. By taking notes and watching English films.

options.label: A
options.text: why we can learn English well

options.label: B
options.text: when we can learn English well

options.label: C
options.text: how we can learn English well

questions.explanation: 根据回答'通过做笔记和看英文电影'可知问的是方式，用how。

questions.question: There are a lot of ______ on the chopping board. Please help me to cut them off.
questions.explanation: tomato的复数形式是tomatoes。potato的复数是potatoes，carrot和onion的复数是规则变化加s。
questions.source: 新课标·劳动实践（新独家原创）

questions.question: There are many old ______ and ______ in the park.
questions.explanation: many修饰可数名词复数，man的复数是men，child的复数是children。

questions.question: ______ do you watch the WTT China Smash? —Because I'm always interested in ping-pong.
questions.explanation: 根据回答'Because...'可知问的是原因，用Why。

questions.question:
—Where ______ Julie ______ from?
—She comes from the USA.
questions.explanation: come from是动词短语，主语Julie是第三人称单数，用does构成疑问句，动词用原形come。

questions.question: There are some dogs, ______ in that village.
questions.explanation: chicken表示'小鸡'是可数名词，复数是chickens；sheep单复数同形，复数还是sheep。

questions.question:
—Do you like swimming, Nancy?
—Yes, I do. I think it's ______ and useful. I can get fun from swimming. Sometimes it can save my life.
questions.explanation: 根据后文'从中获得乐趣'可知游泳是有趣的。

questions.question:
—Who would you like to ask for help when in trouble?
—Miss Lee. She is always ______ to us.
questions.explanation: 根据语境，遇到困难时找李老师帮忙，说明她对我们很友好。

questions.question:
—What do you think of Wang Mei?
—She is a ______ girl. She is good at all subjects.
questions.explanation: 根据'擅长所有科目'可知她很聪明。

questions.question:
—Why do you like to listen to ______ music in your free time?
—Because I feel ______ after listening to it.
questions.explanation: relaxing修饰物，表示'令人放松的'；relaxed修饰人，表示'感到放松的'。

questions.question:
—______?
—He is very tall and has a big nose.

options.label: A
options.text: Why do you like your P.E. teacher

options.label: B
options.text: What does your P.E. teacher look like

options.label: D
options.text: Where is your P.E. teacher from

questions.explanation: 根据回答'很高，大鼻子'可知问的是外貌，用What does...look like。

questions.question: I don't know about farming, but my grandmother gives me much ______ on growing vegetables.
questions.explanation: advice是不可数名词，不能用many修饰，但可以用much修饰。much advice表示'许多建议'。

questions.question: It's ______ to say thank you when someone helps you.
questions.explanation: 当别人帮助时，说谢谢是有礼貌的表现。polite表示'有礼貌的'。

questions.question: If you ______ at the railway station too late, you can't catch the train.
questions.explanation: arrive at表示'到达某地'。get要加to，reach是及物动词直接加地点，come to也表示到达。这里arrive at最合适。

questions.question:
—Mike, can I ______ your bike?
—Sorry, my bike is broken. You can borrow one ______ Amy.
questions.explanation: borrow from表示'从...借入'，lend to表示'借给...'。这里是从Mike那里借，所以用borrow from。

questions.question:
______ people wear helmets when riding electric bicycles?
—Yes. It's a new traffic rule.
questions.explanation: 根据回答'这是新的交通规则'可知是强制要求，用must表示'必须'。

questions.question: ______ too much time playing with mobile phones, boys and girls. It's not good for your health and it's a waste of time.
questions.explanation: 根据语境'对健康不好'、'浪费时间'可知是否定祈使句，用Don't spend。
questions.source: 新课标·批判思维（新独家原创）

questions.question: To save energy, don't forget to ______ the light before you leave the room.
questions.explanation: turn off表示'关掉'，为了节约能源应该关灯。

questions.question:
Sandy is very organized.
—Exactly. ______ in her room is in good order.
questions.explanation: 根据前面说她很有条理，可知房间里的一切都井井有条，用Everything。

questions.question: He ______ much healthier if he ______ enough exercise in his free time.
questions.explanation: if引导的条件状语从句，主句用将来时(will be)，从句用一般现在时(he是第三人称单数，用takes)。

questions.question: You can feel better ______ you take a walk in the park just for 20 minutes.
questions.explanation: if引导条件状语从句，表示'如果'。如果你在公园散步20分钟，你会感觉更好。

questions.question: ______ use the computer too much. It's bad for your eyes.
questions.explanation: 这是一个祈使句的否定形式，用Don't + 动词原形。表示'不要过度使用电脑'。

questions.question: It's going to rain. Please ______ the windows before you leave.
questions.explanation: Please后面跟动词原形，构成祈使句。表示'请关窗'。

questions.question: ______ your room every day. You should keep it tidy.
questions.explanation: 这是一个肯定祈使句，用动词原形开头。表示'每天打扫房间'。

questions.question: ______ quiet, please! You are in the library.
questions.explanation: 这是一个祈使句，用动词原形Keep开头。表示'请保持安静'。

questions.question: —Bill, ______ I use your ruler? —Of course you can. Here you are.
questions.explanation: 根据回答'Of course you can'可知，问句是在请求允许，用can。

questions.question: He gets up late today, so he ______ take the next bus.
questions.explanation: 起床晚了，所以不得不乘下一班车。has to表示客观上的'不得不'。
questions.source: 2024 河北石家庄二十八中期中

questions.question: We ______ eat in the library and we ______ keep quiet.
questions.explanation: 图书馆不能吃东西(can't)，必须保持安静(have to)。
questions.source: 2024 河北石家庄外国语学校期中

questions.question: My sister ______ play the violin well, but she ______ sing well.
questions.explanation: 第一空表示'会'拉小提琴，用can；第二空表示'不会'唱歌，用can't。

questions.question: —______ she have to be quiet in the library? —Yes, she ______. Everyone must follow the rule!
questions.explanation: have to是实义动词，疑问句用助动词Does，回答也用does。
questions.source: 2023 新疆乌鲁木齐四中期中

questions.question: —______ out of the window. Please listen to the teacher. —______.
questions.explanation: 祈使句的否定形式用Don't + 动词原形。回答'抱歉，我不会了'符合语境。
questions.source: 2024 河北石家庄二十八中期中

questions.question: This is not ______ mobile phone. ______ is black, but this one is blue.
questions.explanation: 第一空后面有名词mobile phone，所以用形容词性物主代词my；第二空后面没有名词，用名词性物主代词Mine，相当于My mobile phone。

questions.question: —Let's play ______. —Good idea! But we don't have so many players, only you and me.
questions.explanation: 根据only you and me可知，只有两个人，所以应该玩双人运动。乒乓球(ping-pong)可以两人打，其他选项需要更多队员。

questions.question: If you sleep for only five hours, you may feel ______ the next day.
questions.explanation: 只睡5小时，第二天会感到困倦(sleepy)。excited兴奋的，smart聪明的，awake清醒的，都不符合语境。

questions.question: —Mike, ______ do you play computer games? —Hardly ever. I think it is bad for my study.
questions.explanation: 根据回答Hardly ever(几乎从不)可知，问的是频率，用how often。

questions.question: —Do you often eat chocolate? —No, I ______ eat it because it is unhealthy.
questions.explanation: 根据because it is unhealthy(因为它不健康)可知，从不吃巧克力，用never。
questions.source: 2024 湖北武汉江汉区四校月考

questions.question: The class was over, but I still had ______ questions to ask.
questions.explanation: questions是可数名词复数，用a few表示'一些'，表示还有问题要问。few表示'几乎没有'，与句意不符。

questions.question: —Do more English exercises, and you can make ______. —OK, I will. Thanks for your advice.
questions.explanation: make progress是固定搭配，表示'取得进步'。多做练习是为了取得进步，符合语境。

questions.question: I could ______ understand what he was saying because it's ______ to follow a quick speaker.
questions.explanation: 第一空hardly是副词，表示'几乎不'；第二空hard是形容词，表示'困难的'。句意：我几乎听不懂他在说什么，因为跟上语速快的人很难。

questions.question: Mike's father has some good exercise habits. For example, he ______ at a gym or swims twice a week.
questions.explanation: work out表示'锻炼'，符合健身房锻炼的语境。take out取出，find out找出，put out扑灭，都不符合。

questions.question: —I want to go to the beach and collect the rubbish. —______. It's our duty to keep the beach clean.
questions.explanation: So do I表示'我也是'，用于肯定句的倒装，表示前面所说的情况也适用于另一个人。这里表示'我也想去海滩捡垃圾'。

questions.question: —Mary, is this your sister's smartwatch? —No, ______ is pink.
questions.explanation: 问句中提到your sister's，所以回答用hers，相当于her smartwatch。

questions.question: —Are these crayons yours, Betty? —No. They are my little brother's. ______ are in my schoolbag.
questions.explanation: 根据前文，这些蜡笔是弟弟的，所以'我的'蜡笔在书包里，用Mine。

questions.question: My aunt lives here. Look, the red house near the bank is ______.
questions.explanation: my aunt是女性，所以用hers，表示'她的房子'。
questions.source: 2024 安徽合肥育才联盟期中

questions.question: —Whose watch is this? —Oh, it's not mine. Tony has a watch like this. Maybe it's ______.
questions.explanation: Tony是男性，所以用his，表示'他的手表'。

questions.question: —Gina, have you seen my textbook? —Oh, sorry. I took ______ by mistake.
questions.explanation: 根据my textbook可知，拿错了'你的'课本，用yours。

questions.question: My cousin gets up very early every day, so he is ______ late for school.
questions.explanation: 每天早起，所以从不迟到，用never。

questions.question: —Do you like ping-pong, Linda? —No, I don't. I ______ play it.
questions.explanation: 根据No, I don't可知不喜欢乒乓球，所以很少玩，用seldom。

questions.question: —If you have any problem, my door is ______ open to you. —It's very kind of you.
questions.explanation: 根据语境，表示随时欢迎，门总是开着，用always。

questions.question: I'm excited about going to Singapore and being an exchange student. I have ______ been abroad, so it will be the first time that I have gone to another country.
questions.explanation: 根据the first time可知是第一次出国，所以之前从未出过国，用never。

questions.question: —Bill usually takes a shower in the morning. How about you? —______. I do that only at night.
questions.explanation: 根据I do that only at night可知只在晚上洗澡，所以早上从不洗澡，用Never。

questions.question: It's difficult to go to that village because there is a big river ______ the two villages.
questions.explanation: between用于两者之间，这里指在两个村庄之间有一条大河。

questions.question: —Would you like some ______ in your noodles? —Oh, yes, just a little.
questions.explanation: 根据答语just a little可知，空格处应为不可数名词。mutton是不可数名词，其他选项都是可数名词。

questions.question: —What's your ______, Sandy? —I weigh 70 kg. I think I'm a little fat.
questions.explanation: 根据回答I weigh 70 kg可知，问的是体重(weight)。

questions.question: —I'm very ______, Nancy. Could you give me something to drink? —Here's a bottle of water. Here you are.
questions.explanation: 根据give me something to drink可知，是口渴了(thirsty)。

questions.question: —How does the apple juice ______? —Good. I'd like to have another glass.
questions.explanation: 根据答语Good和have another glass可知，是在谈论果汁的味道(taste)。

questions.question: Read more English books and magazines, and you can ______ your reading skill soon.
questions.explanation: 多读书可以提高(improve)阅读技能。

questions.question: —Dad, I fail again. It's difficult for me ______ a sky lantern. —Keep trying! I'm sure you can do it.
questions.explanation: It's + adj. + for sb. + to do sth. 是固定句型，表示'对某人来说做某事是...的'。

questions.question: —Mom, why don't you let me choose the things I like? —Well, you are ______ to make a decision by yourself.
questions.explanation: 根据语境，妈妈让孩子自己选择，说明孩子已经足够大(old enough)来做决定了。

questions.question: —Do you like red or blue? —______. It is the color that means good luck in China.
questions.explanation: 选择疑问句不能用yes/no回答，根据the color that means good luck in China可知，红色在中国代表好运，所以选Red。

questions.question: —What are you going to do for the school art festival? —We will ______ a new play.
questions.explanation: put on a play表示'上演话剧'，符合艺术节表演的语境。

questions.question: —Grandpa, there are few vegetables in the fridge. —I'll get ten ______ after lunch.
questions.explanation: ten后面要用可数名词复数形式，carrot的复数是carrots。apples虽然是复数，但苹果不是蔬菜，不符合语境。

questions.question: She likes some ______ and ______ for lunch.
questions.explanation: beef是不可数名词，没有复数形式；potato是可数名词，some后面用复数potatoes。

questions.question: Let's buy some food from that store after work. ______ and cabbages are on sale.
questions.explanation: 这里chicken作为'鸡肉'是不可数名词，没有复数形式。chickens表示'小鸡'，不符合语境。

questions.question: —I have a toothache. —Sorry to hear that. You'd better not eat too much ______. Sweet food is bad for teeth.
questions.explanation: 根据Sweet food is bad for teeth可知，应该是不吃太多甜食。sweets是'糖果'，sugar是'糖'，但too much修饰不可数名词，sweets是可数名词，所以选B。

questions.question: —How much paper do you need? —______, please.
questions.explanation: paper是不可数名词，表示数量要用piece of，复数时piece加s，paper不变。

questions.question: —Can you give me ______ on what to wear to the party, Sandy? —Of course. I think the red evening dress is perfect.
questions.explanation: advice是不可数名词，没有复数形式，不能用an修饰。肯定句中用some。

questions.question: —The Golden Week is coming. Do you want to go to Nanjing or Beijing? —______. I always want to visit the Great Wall.
questions.explanation: 选择疑问句不能用yes/no回答。根据I always want to visit the Great Wall可知，长城在北京，所以选Beijing。

questions.question: —Does Nancy live in France or America? —______. She lives in Chicago with her parents.
questions.explanation: 选择疑问句不能用yes/no回答。芝加哥在美国，所以选America。

questions.question: —Would you like a large bowl or a small bowl of noodles? —______. I don't eat much.
questions.explanation: 根据I don't eat much可知，吃得不多，所以要小碗。

questions.question: —Do you like listening to music or playing chess? —______. It makes me relaxed.

options.label: A
options.text: Yes, I like listening to music

options.label: B
options.text: No, I don't like playing chess

questions.explanation: 选择疑问句要从选项中选择一个回答。根据It makes me relaxed可知，听音乐让我放松，所以选Listening to music。

questions.question: I won't spend too much ______ on a mobile phone. I think ¥1,500 is enough.
questions.explanation: 根据¥1,500 is enough可知，是花钱(money)买手机。

questions.question: —Could you give me some ______? I tried many times but failed. —Fine. I just have some tips for you.
questions.explanation: 根据I just have some tips for you可知，对方要的是建议(advice)。

questions.question: —We all want to book the hotel ______ a large swimming pool. —It must be very exciting to swim in the pool.
questions.explanation: with表示'带有，具有'，a hotel with a large swimming pool表示'带有一个大型游泳池的酒店'。

questions.question: —Would you like something to eat? —Yes, please. I'd like some ______. I like it very much.
questions.explanation: 问句是Would you like something to eat?，所以回答应该是食物。bread是食物，其他选项都是饮品。

questions.question: —If you don't get enough sleep, you will feel ______. —That's true. We all need to sleep for about eight hours every day.
questions.explanation: 睡眠不足会感到困倦(sleepy)。

questions.question: I don't like this museum because there are ______ rules in it.
questions.explanation: rules是可数名词复数，用too many修饰。too many表示'太多'。

questions.question: —Linda, can you go out with me now? —I'm afraid I ______ do the dishes first.
questions.explanation: 根据语境，必须先洗碗，表示客观上的'不得不'，用have to。

questions.question: —What time will you ______ Shanghai, Mike? —At about 5 p.m., so I should ______ Nanjing Railway Station at 3 p.m.
questions.explanation: 到达大地点用arrive in，到达小地点用get to。Shanghai是大地点，Nanjing Railway Station是具体车站，用小地点表达。

questions.question: It's a good habit to ______ the lights when you leave a room.
questions.explanation: 离开房间时关灯(turn off)是好习惯。

questions.question: In the Harbin Ice and Snow World, you can find some buildings ______ ice.
questions.explanation: 建筑物由冰制成，能看出原材料，用made of。

questions.question: —Would you like ______ to eat? —______ will be OK! I could eat a horse.
questions.explanation: 期望得到肯定回答时，用something；anything表示'任何东西'，符合I could eat a horse的语境。

questions.question: It is really dangerous ______ people run the red traffic lights.
questions.explanation: if表示'如果'，句意：如果人们闯红灯，真的很危险。

questions.question: This must be my brother's T-shirt. It must belong to ______ because he always loves red.
questions.explanation: belong to是介词短语，后面跟宾语，用代词的宾格形式him。

questions.question: My grandfather has a large farm and there are a lot of ______ on the farm.
questions.explanation: a lot of后面跟可数名词复数。sheep单复数同形，其他选项都是单数形式，复数应为horses, cows, pigs。

questions.question: Tian Xin has good eating habits, so she is very ______.
questions.explanation: 良好的饮食习惯会让人健康(healthy)。

questions.question: The chocolate ______ nice. I want to eat one more piece, Daddy.
questions.explanation: 巧克力尝起来(tastes)美味，符合语境。

questions.question: ______ does your cousin attend guitar classes? —Twice a week.
questions.explanation: 根据回答Twice a week可知，问的是频率，用How often。

questions.question: Mr. Liu often encourages us ______ with others in English.
questions.explanation: encourage sb. to do sth.是固定搭配，表示'鼓励某人做某事'。

questions.question: ______ sugar can be bad for your health. So eat less sugar.
questions.explanation: sugar是不可数名词，用too much修饰。too much表示'太多'。

questions.question: —What is happening ______ the man over there? —He is lying on the ground and needs medical help.
questions.explanation: happen to sb.表示'发生在某人身上'，是固定搭配。

questions.question: Lisa isn't at home, so I'll leave a ______ for her.
questions.explanation: leave a message是固定搭配，表示'留口信'。

questions.question: Mary's father often ______ his car to go to work because his office is far away from their home.
questions.explanation: 开车用drive，drive one's car表示'开某人的车'。

questions.question: The old lady is walking across the road ______. Let's go and help her.
questions.explanation: 根据Let's go and help her可知，老太太走路慢(slowly)，需要帮助。

questions.question: The Great Wall is so famous that a lot of people hope ______ it.
questions.explanation: hope to do sth.是固定搭配，表示'希望做某事'。

questions.question: —Professor Wang will give us a talk on the history of Huai'an tomorrow. —Really? I look forward ______ it.
questions.explanation: look forward to doing sth.是固定搭配，to是介词，后面跟动名词。

questions.question: —Where is Mark? —Look! He ______ a walk with his dad over there.
questions.explanation: 根据Look!可知，正在发生的事情，用现在进行时is taking。

questions.question: It's ______ an important meeting that everyone is advised to dress properly.
questions.explanation: such + a/an + 形容词 + 名词 + that从句，表示'如此...以至于...'。

questions.question: —Tommy, is there ______ in the classroom now? —No. All the students are having a P.E. lesson in the playground.
questions.explanation: 一般疑问句中用anybody，表示'任何人'。

questions.question: My brother is good at playing ping-pong. He is going to ______ the school ping-pong match next week.
questions.explanation: take part in表示'参加'活动或比赛。

questions.question: Look! The traffic lights are green. We can go ______ the road now.
questions.explanation: go across the road表示'穿过马路'，across强调从表面横穿。

questions.question: The ______ is about -10℃ and it's very cold. I don't want to go outside.
questions.explanation: 根据-10℃可知，说的是温度(temperature)。

questions.question: There has been no rain for two months, so the weather is really ______.
questions.explanation: 两个月没下雨，天气很干燥(dry)。

questions.question: The weather seems ______ colder and colder. It's time for me to buy some thick clothes.
questions.explanation: seem to do sth.是固定搭配，表示'似乎做某事'。

questions.question: My sister isn't feeling well. She has a bad cold and doesn't feel like ______ anything.
questions.explanation: feel like doing sth.是固定搭配，表示'想要做某事'。

questions.question: Look! It's raining ______. Don't go out if you don't have an umbrella or a raincoat.
questions.explanation: rain heavily表示'下大雨'，是固定搭配。

questions.question: —Only ten students are in the classroom. Where are ______ students? —They are in the school library.
questions.explanation: the other students特指其他的学生，the other修饰复数名词students。
questions.source: 2024 湖北武汉东西湖区期中

questions.question: —Sorry I can't hear you. The wind ______ hard. Can you speak louder? —That's OK. I'll ring you later.
questions.explanation: 根据语境，风正在刮，用现在进行时is blowing。

questions.question: Everyone loves my dog Coffee, ______ he often makes a mess at home.
questions.explanation: though表示'虽然'，引导让步状语从句。句意：虽然Coffee经常把家弄乱，但大家都爱它。

questions.question: —Haven't seen you for ages, Mike. —______? —Pretty good! Everything goes well.
questions.explanation: 根据回答Pretty good可知，问的是近况如何，How's it going是常用问候语。

questions.question: Look! My little brother ______ with his toy car now.
questions.explanation: 根据now和Look!可知，正在发生的事情，用现在进行时is playing。

questions.question: —Where is Helen? —I'm not sure. Maybe she ______ her baseball lesson.
questions.explanation: 根据问句Where is Helen?可知，询问的是现在的情况，用现在进行时is having表示正在上课。

questions.question: —Where is your father, Kate? —Look, Mom! He ______ a newspaper in the garden.
questions.explanation: 根据Look!可知，正在发生的事情，用现在进行时is reading。

questions.question: Look! The boys from Class 6 ______ in the playground.
questions.explanation: 根据Look!可知，正在发生的事情，主语是复数，用are playing。

questions.question: Be quiet! Your little brother ______ in the bedroom now.
questions.explanation: 根据Be quiet!和now可知，弟弟正在睡觉，用现在进行时is sleeping。

questions.question: —Listen! Tom ______ an English song now. —Oh, he always ______ loudly in his room.
questions.explanation: 第一空根据Listen!可知用现在进行时；第二空根据always可知用一般现在时。

questions.question: —Peter, what's Jeff doing? —He ______ a football match online.
questions.explanation: 根据what's Jeff doing可知，问的是正在做什么，用现在进行时is watching。

questions.question: Mum ______ dinner in the kitchen. Let's go and help her.
questions.explanation: 根据Let's go and help her可知，妈妈正在做饭，用现在进行时is preparing。

questions.question: —Where is Wendy? —She ______ a football match in the playground.
questions.explanation: 根据问句Where is Wendy?可知，询问现在的位置，答句说明正在进行的活动，用现在进行时is watching。

questions.question: —Listen! Someone ______ in the next room. —It must be Lily. She practices singing every afternoon.
questions.explanation: 根据Listen!可知，正在发生的事情，用现在进行时is singing。

questions.question: —Mum, where are my coolers? —Your brother Tom ______ them in his room now.
questions.explanation: 根据now可知，正在使用，用现在进行时is using。

questions.question: —Mum, can I go out to play basketball with Mike? —I'm afraid not. It ______ hard now.
questions.explanation: 根据now可知，正在下雨，用现在进行时is raining。

questions.question: ______ is the weather like today? —It's sunny. Some boys ______ kites in the park.
questions.explanation: What is the weather like是询问天气的固定句型；根据语境，孩子们正在放风筝，用现在进行时are flying。

questions.question: —Is your sister playing with her mobile phone? —______. She is sleeping in her bedroom.
questions.explanation: 根据She is sleeping可知，姐姐没有在玩手机，用No, she isn't回答现在进行时的一般疑问句。

questions.question: —What are these Chinese soldiers ______ over there? —They are practising their fighting skills.
questions.explanation: 根据问句中的are和答语They are practising可知，问的是正在做什么，用doing。

questions.question: Miss Li is ______ teacher. She teaches ______ Chinese.
questions.explanation: 第一空修饰名词teacher，用形容词性物主代词our；第二空作teaches的宾语，用人称代词宾格us。

questions.question: There is a new ______ near here. Let's go there and watch a movie.
questions.explanation: 根据watch a movie可知，是去看电影的地方，theatre表示'电影院、剧院'。

questions.question: My weekend was ______. We went to the farm, but it rained all day. We didn't happy at all.
questions.explanation: 根据rained all day和didn't happy at all可知，周末很糟糕(terrible)。

questions.question: I ask my brother not to ______ more time watching short videos. He should spend more time on his schoolwork.
questions.explanation: 根据should spend more time on his schoolwork可知，不要浪费时间(waste)看短视频。

questions.question: Jessica ______ every night before her Chinese test and got good results.
questions.explanation: 根据got good results可知，动作发生在过去，用一般过去时studied。

questions.question: —What about the pink dress? —I like it. But I need to ______ first before I take it.
questions.explanation: try on是动副短语，代词it作宾语时放在中间，即try it on。
questions.source: 2024 安徽合肥经济技术开发区期中

questions.question: If you want to join our club, please use this pen to ______ your names on paper, David.
questions.explanation: 根据语境，是在纸上写下(write down)名字。

questions.question: After a two-hour discussion, they ______ came to an agreement.
questions.explanation: 经过两小时的讨论，最终(finally)达成了协议。

questions.question: —Billy ______ shy and quiet, but he is very outgoing now. —Yes. We are all surprised at his changes.
questions.explanation: used to be表示'过去曾经是'，与now形成对比。

questions.question: —There is still a long way to go ______ we finish the task. —Don't worry. Let's go on with it together.
questions.explanation: before表示'在...之前'，句意：在我们完成任务之前还有很长的路要走。

questions.question: My sister is afraid ______ the tigers. She thinks they are dangerous and scary.
questions.explanation: be afraid of是固定搭配，表示'害怕...'。

questions.question: —Maria, you should believe in ______. That's the secret of success. —OK, I will.
questions.explanation: 主语是you，宾语用反身代词yourself，表示'相信你自己'。

questions.question: These T-shirts are in different ______: large, medium and small.
questions.explanation: 根据large, medium and small可知，是不同尺寸(sizes)。

questions.question: The children decide ______ their school yard this Friday afternoon.
questions.explanation: decide to do sth.是固定搭配，表示'决定做某事'。
questions.source: 2024 天津宁河区第一学区期末

questions.question: Choose me as your monitor and I ______ to help you.
questions.explanation: promise to do sth.表示'承诺做某事'，符合竞选班长的语境。

questions.question: My brother is ______ and he seems to know everything. I always ask him for help.
questions.explanation: 根据know everything和ask him for help可知，哥哥很聪明(wise)。

questions.question: My grandpa ______ with me about his hometown yesterday.
questions.explanation: 根据yesterday可知，用一般过去时talked。

questions.question: The police were looking into a theft in a small village. They ______ the village for days.
questions.explanation: search + 地点表示'搜查某地'；search for表示'寻找某物'。这里搜查村庄，用searched。

questions.question: ______, I didn't want to be a teacher. But now I love my job as a Chinese teacher.
questions.explanation: 根据but now可知，前后对比，at first表示'起初'。

questions.question: —It was sunny several minutes ago, but it's raining heavily now! —______ difference a day makes!
questions.explanation: difference是可数名词单数，用What a引导感叹句。

questions.question: Ten minutes ago, my sister ______ in her bedroom. But now she is in the garden.
questions.explanation: 根据ago可知是过去时，主语是my sister，用was。

questions.question: My classmate Mike ______ for the math test last night.
questions.explanation: 根据last night可知用一般过去时，动词用过去式studied。

questions.question: —What did you do last Saturday, Tina? —I ______ to the nursing home and worked as a volunteer there.
questions.explanation: 根据last Saturday和worked可知，用一般过去时went。

questions.question: There ______ a small lake in my hometown ten years ago, and I often swam there.
questions.explanation: 根据ten years ago可知用过去时，主语是a small lake，用was。

questions.question: Mike and his friends didn't watch Zootopia last Sunday. In fact, they ______ football.
questions.explanation: 根据last Sunday可知是过去时，用played。

questions.question: Tom often ______ to school by bike, but he ______ a bus to school this morning.
questions.explanation: often用一般现在时goes；this morning用一般过去时took。

questions.question: Eric often ______ his grandma on weekends but last weekend he ______.
questions.explanation: often用一般现在时visits；last weekend用一般过去时，否定形式didn't。
questions.source: 2023 山东青岛胶州市区期末

questions.question: —Did you enjoy yourselves in the countryside last Sunday? —Yes. We ______ the mountains and ______ some great places.
questions.explanation: 根据last Sunday可知用一般过去时，两个并列动词都用过去式climbed和visited。
questions.source: 2024 江西南昌外国语学校教育集团期末

questions.question: —My father ______ me a funny story but I can't remember its name. —Why don't you ask your father now?
questions.explanation: 根据I can't remember its name可知，故事是过去讲的，用一般过去时told。

questions.question: —______ your mom in Luzhou yesterday? —Yes. And she ______ still there now.
questions.explanation: yesterday用一般过去时Was；now用一般现在时is。
questions.source: 2024 四川泸州龙马潭区期末

questions.question: —______ did you go to Nanjing last weekend? —My father drove us there. It only took one hour.
questions.explanation: 根据drove和took one hour可知，问的是方式，用How。

questions.question: —______ was Strauss born? —He was born in Vienna, the capital of Austria.
questions.explanation: 根据in Vienna可知，问地点，用Where。

questions.question: —Was there an old man named Tom in your village in the past? —______.
questions.explanation: 问句是there be句型的一般过去时，主语是单数，否定回答用No, there wasn't。

questions.question: —______ you in the city in 2015? —No. I ______ here two years ago.
questions.explanation: in 2015用一般过去时Were；two years ago用一般过去时moved。

questions.question: —______? —I started it three months ago.

options.label: A
options.text: Why did you love to swim

options.label: B
options.text: When did you start to swim

options.label: C
options.text: How did you learn to swim

options.label: D
options.text: How long did you usually swim

questions.explanation: 根据回答three months ago可知，问的是开始的时间，用When did you start to swim。

questions.question: What special food do Chinese people eat on their birthdays?
questions.explanation: 中国人过生日通常会吃长寿面或蛋糕，根据图片选择正确答案。

questions.question: —We should tell the ______ not to swim in the river. —You are right. We must tell them.
questions.explanation: 根据后面的them可知，空格处应用复数名词，children是复数形式。

questions.question: A man should be strict with himself, but be ______ to others.
questions.explanation: 根据语境，对自己严格，对他人要友好(friendly)。

questions.question: I ______ get up early this morning. There is not much work today.
questions.explanation: 根据There is not much work today可知，今天不必早起，用don't have to。
questions.source: 2023 湖北武汉知行联盟月考

questions.question: Qiqi hopes ______ medicine in Sichuan University.
questions.explanation: hope to do sth.是固定搭配，表示'希望做某事'。

questions.question: —Where's your brother, Jane? —He ______ an English song in his room.
questions.explanation: 问句询问现在的位置，答语说明正在进行的动作，用现在进行时is singing。

questions.question: —Look at Panda Ya Ya! ______ happy she is! —Yes. There is enough fresh bamboo for her to eat now.
questions.explanation: happy是形容词，用How引导感叹句，结构为How + 形容词 + 主语 + 谓语！

questions.question: —Who cooked the hot dry noodles for you? They're delicious. —______. I learned to cook them by myself on the Internet.
questions.explanation: 根据I learned to cook them by myself可知，没有人帮忙，是自己做的，用Nobody。

questions.question: —Xiao Hai won first prize at our school art festival. —Wonderful! I am ______ his next performance.
questions.explanation: look forward to表示'期待'，符合听到好消息后期待下次表演的语境。

questions.question: —Lily, can you tell me ______ during the Dragon Boat Festival this year? —Sure. We ate zongzi and watched a dragon boat race.
questions.explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序，根据ate和watched可知是过去时，用what you did。

questions.question: —Congratulations! Can you share your secret to learning? —If you work hard enough, you will succeed ______ achieving your goal.
questions.explanation: succeed in doing sth.是固定搭配，表示'成功做某事'。

questions.question: —I don't know how to lose weight. Could you give me some ______? —Sure. Eating less and exercising more are good ways.
questions.explanation: advice是不可数名词，用some修饰。suggestion是可数名词，应用suggestions。

questions.question: Matt is very ______ in school and he gets on well with everyone.
questions.explanation: 根据gets on well with everyone可知，Matt很有礼貌(polite)。

questions.question: —I ______ to cook dinner for my family. —Sounds great. You can go shopping to buy some vegetables and meat first.
questions.explanation: 根据Sounds great和go shopping可知，承诺(promise)为家人做饭。
questions.source: 2024 安徽合肥龙城教育集团期中

questions.question: —Jim, I've got a problem with my car. Could you help me? —Sorry, not right now. I ______ a short video.
questions.explanation: 根据not right now可知，正在制作短视频，用现在进行时am making。

questions.question: —Lily, your new schoolbag is pretty. ______ did you buy it? —In a store near my home.
questions.explanation: 根据回答In a store可知，问地点，用Where。

questions.question: Don't buy things ______ of the animals' body parts. It is a way to protect them.
questions.explanation: things made of表示'由...制成的东西'，过去分词短语作后置定语。

questions.question: Running is getting popular. It is good for our health and it costs ______.
questions.explanation: 跑步对健康有好处，而且不需要花费任何东西(costs nothing)。

questions.question: —After the Spring Festival, I ______ five kilos because I ate more and didn't exercise. —That is called 'holiday obesity'.
questions.explanation: put on表示'增加(体重)'，符合春节期间吃多不运动导致体重增加的语境。

questions.question: ______ you are too tired to do all the things on your To-Do list, try a To-Don't list.
questions.explanation: if引导条件状语从句，表示'如果'。句意：如果你太累做不完清单上的事，试试'不做清单'。
